description_long: This is a triple-bulb wall sconce with a sleek, industrial design. The fixture features three rounded, black metal lamp shades, each housing a visible filament-style bulb, mounted on a horizontal chrome or polished steel bar. The bar is attached to a circular wall plate, which provides sturdy support and a clean, modern look. The lamp shades are symmetrically spaced and slightly angled downward, optimizing light distribution. The overall finish is glossy, with reflective surfaces that enhance its contemporary aesthetic. This sconce is well-suited for urban environments such as building exteriors, garages, or modern entryways.
description: A glossy black triple-bulb wall sconce with rounded metal shades and a polished horizontal bar, exuding a modern industrial style.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three rounded black lamp shades, the horizontal bar, and the central circular wall plate.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the lamp shades and the curvature of the mounting arms extending from the wall plate.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the circular wall plate and the symmetrical arrangement of the lamp shades from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the lamp shades and the mounting structure.
attribute_fixture_design: Modern industrial design with glossy black metal shades and a polished chrome bar, featuring clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
